_comment: Disease knowledge base — Multilingual AI Crop Doctor

brown_leaf_spot.symptoms: Circular to oval brown spots with yellow halos on leaves; spots may coalesce at severe stage
brown_leaf_spot.organic_treatment: Spray neem oil (3%) + garlic extract solution. Remove and destroy heavily infected leaves.
brown_leaf_spot.chemical_treatment: Mancozeb 75% WP @ 2.5 g/L water. Spray at 10-day intervals.

severity_markers.mild: Scattered small spots on <10% of leaf area
severity_markers.moderate: Spots on 10–30% of leaf area, some coalescing
severity_markers.severe: Spots covering >30% of leaves, widespread chlorosis

blast.symptoms: Diamond-shaped grey-green lesions with brown borders on leaves and neck
blast.organic_treatment: Spray Pseudomonas fluorescens (talc formulation) @ 5 g/L water. Maintain field drainage.
blast.chemical_treatment: Tricyclazole 75% WP @ 0.6 g/L water or Isoprothiolane 40% EC @ 1.5 ml/L.
blast.yield_impact: Up to 50% if neck blast occurs at heading stage

severity_markers.mild: Small lesions on lower leaves only
severity_markers.moderate: Lesions on multiple leaf layers, some neck infection
severity_markers.severe: Neck blast, empty panicles, widespread damage

yellow_rust.symptoms: Bright yellow-orange pustules in stripes along leaf veins; leaves feel powdery
yellow_rust.organic_treatment: Remove infected plant debris. Avoid excess nitrogen fertiliser. Plant resistant varieties next season.
yellow_rust.chemical_treatment: Propiconazole 25% EC @ 0.1% solution. Spray at first sign of symptoms.
yellow_rust.yield_impact: 10–70% depending on growth stage at infection

severity_markers.mild: Yellow pustule stripes on <5% of leaf area
